[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0010000 1
4 0111110 5
5 0000100 1
6 0110101 4
7 1000100 2

01 10 0110100 3
12 21 0000110 2
23 32 0000100 1 match 5
34 43 0000101 2
45 54 0000101 2
56 65 0010000 1 match 3
67 76 0011000 2
70 07 0110100 3

02 20 0000100 1 match 5
13 31 0110101 4 match 6
24 42 1000100 2 match 7
35 53 0010101 3
46 64 0001000 1
57 75 0010110 3
60 06 0010000 1 match 3
71 17 0111110 5 match 4

03 30 0110100 3
14 41 0001101 3
25 52 0000110 2
36 63 0010000 1 match 3
47 74 1001100 3
50 05 0010100 2
61 16 0011000 2
72 27 1000110 3

04 40 0000100 1 match 5
15 51 0010111 4
26 62 0000000 a match 0 1 2
37 73 0110100 3
